title: KMP
description: Kiss me Please is a blood-soaked, crimson CPvP pack built on a hellish red aesthetic — bold contrasts, dark atmosphere, and clean competitive textures drenched in red. 🩸
body:
# 🩸 Kiss me Please — texture pack 🩸
**✨ Short Description**
Kiss me Please is a dark, blood-red CPvP texture pack soaked in crimson and chaos — bold netherite reds, vivid teal diamond contrast, and a hellish sky that makes every fight feel like the last one ❤️‍🔥⚔️.

---

## 💎 What to Expect
- 🩸 Deep crimson and dark purple palette with vivid teal diamond armor for instant visual contrast.
- 💀 Dark, atmospheric textures with an infernal, blood-soaked aesthetic.
- ⚡ Low-resolution performance-first textures — stable FPS even on low-end machines.
- 🎯 Strong item and armor readability preserved for competitive play.

---

## 🔑 Key Features
- 📦 Optimized 16×16 textures built for CPvP.
- 🎯 Clean item designs — swords, bows, axes, potions.
- 💨 Reduced particle clutter — intense visuals without hurting your focus.
- 🧩 Compatible with most PvP clients (Badlion, Lunar, etc.).

---

## 📥 Installation
1. ⬇️ Download the `.zip` from Modrinth.
2. ⚙️ Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → "Open Pack Folder".
3. 📂 Drop the downloaded zip inside (no need to unzip).
4. 🔄 Enable the pack.

---

## 🔗 Compatibility
- 🖥️ Minecraft versions: **1.20 - 1.21.11**
- ✅ Compatible with most PvP clients ([FoxClient](https://www.foxclient.eu), Badlion, Lunar, etc.); adjust pack priority if needed.
